task: Find the statistics on major causes of death for people 65 and older in the US in 2002 (attach the url to the statistics) and list five top diseases. For each disease, please tell me which main specialty it belongs to (except Geriatrics) and find out which hospital in the US is the best for this specialty according to US News ranking.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed all aspects of the task. It accurately identified the major causes of death for people 65 and older in the US in 2002, providing a direct URL to the CDC source. It then correctly listed the top five diseases, identified the main medical specialty for each (excluding Geriatrics as requested), and found the best hospital for each specialty according to the US News 2025-2026 rankings. The output is well-structured, clear, and includes appropriate citations. Although the agent initially failed to extract text from the PDF using bash commands, it successfully gathered the necessary information from web search results and excerpts, demonstrating good problem-solving and adaptability. The agent also provided helpful notes regarding the ranking year and the categorization of influenza/pneumonia under pulmonology.
